journey.name: outbound-message
journey.description: Compose and send a channel message from the app; the device plane confirms it on the wire.

actions.action: Complete onboarding if shown and connect to {DUT_ADDR} over TCP.
Open Messages, then Channels, then the Primary Channel.
Type {TOKEN} into the message compose field.
Verify the app shows the message in the conversation (delivery state may show an error icon in a flat mesh — that is expected; assert wire truth separately via the recorder).
